OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    29→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    30→  }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"430e7edb-15de-4506-b657-809841468799","timestamp":"2026-03-23T13:07:07.612Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n  }","numLines":30,"startLine":1,"totalLines":86}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01TD7aqcRYPJ8TerqnRdiRVU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_016h3rNdwKiqyzsD69VQ4hKE","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","old_string":"  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];","new_string":"  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":589,"cache_read_input_tokens":44234,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":589},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"3324da84-c3c8-49f9-bf37-16344f858325"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_stop"},"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"6fb1467d-0e0a-41b8-a2c7-a8bc1bbd9c8f"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016h3rNdwKiqyzsD69VQ4hKE","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"1eacd90e-b1da-444d-9b85-4c3ea2cf5552","timestamp":"2026-03-23T13:11:29.866Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","oldString":"  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];","newString":"  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n\n  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n  if (!includePast) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n  }\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    params.push(meetingFormat);\n  }\n\n  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(startDateFrom);\n  }\n\n  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n\n  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n\n  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n\n  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n  const countResult = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    )\n    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n\n  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listings,\n    pagination: {\n      page,\n      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n      total: countResult.total,\n      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":16,"oldLines":13,"newStart":16,"newLines":13,"lines":["   const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : pageParam;"," ","   const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];","+  const params: (string | number)[] = [];"," ","   // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past","   if (!includePast) {","     conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");","     params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);","   }","-  const params: (string | number)[] = [];"," ","   if (q && q.length <= 300) {","     conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

A ?include_past=true parameter is available\nfor viewing them. Adds a \"Past start date\" badge on listing detail pages.\n\nCloses #66\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit changes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":215,"cache_read_input_tokens":46636,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":215},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"21f3fd77-dbcb-4849-90ac-3d33b09ba347"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HcnJTuuEWDszkRBFtegZxw","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Sqg2AAkp8og6a2WRUGF1g7","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"feat: auto-hide listings with past start dates\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- Listings with start dates in the past are now hidden from the browse feed by default\n- Added `?include_past=true` query parameter to the listings API for viewing past listings\n- Added a \"Past start date\" badge on listing detail pages for listings with past start dates\n\nCloses #66\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 60 existing tests pass\n- [x] Build passes cleanly\n- [x] Lint passes\n- [ ] Browse feed no longer shows listings with past start dates\n- [ ] Adding `?include_past=true` to API shows past listings\n- [ ] Listing detail page shows \"Past start date\" badge for old listings\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" 2>&1","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":294,"cache_read_input_tokens":47096,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":294},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"4ae1f424-6ad9-4f91-b44f-28f360f2d221"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01HYkvaqXwccP81a3FrLw1AU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01UkcJrnxvbEMgMZtPoRGnMs","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-23_14-00.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-23 14:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 2106s, DB connected, homepage rendering correctly)\n- **Follow-ups**:\n  - #65 (listing edit/delete): Was already merged in PR #69 but issue open — closed it\n  - #54 (PAT expiry): 4 days remaining, added urgent reminder comment\n  - #21 (Telegram token): Still waiting on human\n- **PRD sync**: All features have issues, no new issues needed\n- **Work selected**: #66 Auto-hide listings with past start dates (P2, only approved issue)\n\n## Work Done\n### Implemented #66: Auto-hide listings with past start dates\n- **API change**: Added `l.start_date >= today` filter to browse API by default\n- **New param**: `?include_past=true` disables the filter\n- **UI badge**: Added \"Past start date\" gray badge on listing detail page\n- **Files changed**: `app/api/listings/route.ts`, `app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`\n- **PR #70**: Created, CI passed, merged, deployed\n- **Production verified**: Health endpoint OK, listings API correctly returns only future-dated listings\n\n## Housekeeping\n- Closed issue #65 (already merged)\n- Added PAT reminder on #54 (4 days left)\n- Added PR #70 and issue #66 to project board\n\n## Issues Status\n- Open: #54 (PAT, needs-human, 4 days), #21 (Telegram token, needs-human)\n- No remaining approved issues to work on\n\n## Next Session\n1. Check #54 PAT status (3 days remaining)\n2. Check if any new issues have been created\n3. Consider proposing new improvements (E2E tests, more test coverage, UX refinements)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":384,"cache_read_input_tokens":50123,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":384},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"66943f80-578f-48a5-aa37-dc224ee7d5c5"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UkcJrnxvbEMgMZtPoRGnMs","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-23_14-00.md"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"b1f9d4a5-f48a-4f79-aa3d-bbd289311f83","timestamp":"2026-03-23T13:15:00.346Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-23_14-00.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-23 14:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 2106s, DB connected, homepage rendering correctly)\n- **Follow-ups**:\n  - #65 (listing edit/delete): Was already merged in PR #69 but issue open — closed it\n  - #54 (PAT expiry): 4 days remaining, added urgent reminder comment\n  - #21 (Telegram token): Still waiting on human\n- **PRD sync**: All features have issues, no new issues needed\n- **Work selected**: #66 Auto-hide listings with past start dates (P2, only approved issue)\n\n## Work Done\n### Implemented #66: Auto-hide listings with past start dates\n- **API change**: Added `l.start_date >= today` filter to browse API by default\n- **New param**: `?include_past=true` disables the filter\n- **UI badge**: Added \"Past start date\" gray badge on listing detail page\n- **Files changed**: `app/api/listings/route.ts`, `app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx`\n- **PR #70**: Created, CI passed, merged, deployed\n- **Production verified**: Health endpoint OK, listings API correctly returns only future-dated listings\n\n## Housekeeping\n- Closed issue #65 (already merged)\n- Added PAT reminder on #54 (4 days left)\n- Added PR #70 and issue #66 to project board\n\n## Issues Status\n- Open: #54 (PAT, needs-human, 4 days), #21 (Telegram token, needs-human)\n- No remaining approved issues to work on\n\n## Next Session\n1. DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n    65→- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n    66→- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n    67→- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n    68→- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n    69→- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n    70→- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n    71→- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n    72→- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n    73→- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n    74→- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n    75→- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n    76→\n    77→## Test Suite\n    78→- 59 tests across 8 test files, all passing\n    79→- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings, notifications, profile, ratings, rate-limit\n    80→- Not user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01SSRUYa55kytUDf8QsZKRZA","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VLr13u5HyWiYDfpEBEhqgh","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/MEMORY.md","old_string":"## Closed Recently\n- #60: Expanded test coverage to 59 tests (notifications, profile, ratings) — merged\n- #59: Vitest test infrastructure with 28 initial tests — merged\n- #58: next/image optimization + SEO (robots.txt, sitemap.xml) — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~6 days left","new_string":"## Closed Recently\n- #70: Auto-hide listings with past start dates — merged + deployed\n- #69: Listing edit and delete for authors — merged + deployed\n- #68: fix: generateMetadata crash, platform-aware notifications — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1094,"cache_read_input_tokens":51161,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1094},"output_tokens":48,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"21720909-21d1-48d6-8f11-244da9240f09"}

+ SEO (robots.txt, sitemap.xml) — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~6 days left","newString":"## Closed Recently\n- #70: Auto-hide listings with past start dates — merged + deployed\n- #69: Listing edit and delete for authors — merged + deployed\n- #68: fix: generateMetadata crash, platform-aware notifications — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #60: Expanded test coverage to 59 tests (notifications, profile, ratings) — merged\n- #59: Vitest test infrastructure with 28 initial tests — merged\n- #58: next/image optimization + SEO (robots.txt, sitemap.xml) — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~6 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 59 tests across 8 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings, notifications, profile, ratings, rate-limit\n- Not yet tested: telegram, discord, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, listing detail routes\n- Coverage: ~88% statement coverage on tested files\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~6 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. Consider proposing more improvements (test coverage for remaining routes, E2E tests, etc.)\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":44,"oldLines":13,"newStart":44,"newLines":13,"lines":[" - None"," "," ## Closed Recently","-- #60: Expanded test coverage to 59 tests (notifications, profile, ratings) — merged","-- #59: Vitest test infrastructure with 28 initial tests — merged","-- #58: next/image optimization + SEO (robots.txt, sitemap.xml) — merged + deployed","+- #70: Auto-hide listings with past start dates — merged + deployed","+- #69: Listing edit and delete for authors — merged + deployed","+- #68: fix: generateMetadata crash, platform-aware notifications — merged + deployed"," "," ## Open Issues"," - #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting","-- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~6 days left","+- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left"," "," ## Important Notes"," - GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. Consider proposing more improvements (test coverage for remaining routes, E2E tests, etc.)","newString":"## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~4 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. No remaining approved issues — consider proposing new improvements","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #70: Auto-hide listings with past start dates — merged + deployed\n- #69: Listing edit and delete for authors — merged + deployed\n- #68: fix: generateMetadata crash, platform-aware notifications — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 59 tests across 8 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings, notifications, profile, ratings, rate-limit\n- Not yet tested: telegram, discord, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, listing detail routes\n- Coverage: ~88% statement coverage on tested files\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~6 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. Consider proposing more improvements (test coverage for remaining routes, E2E tests, etc.)\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":82,"oldLines":7,"newStart":82,"newLines":7,"lines":[" - @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting"," "," ## Next Session Priority","-1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~6 days remaining, still needs-human","+1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~4 days remaining, still needs-human"," 2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response"," 3. Check production health","-4. Consider proposing more improvements (test coverage for remaining routes, E2E tests, etc.)","+4. No remaining approved issues — consider proposing new improvements"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"e6f81e7f-4d68-488e-94a7-39b553836aa3","timestamp":"2026-03-23T13:15:18.414Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/MEMORY.md","oldString":"- 59 tests across 8 test files, all passing","newString":"- 60 tests across 8 test files, all passing","originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- CI pipeline live: GitHub Actions runs lint + type check + build on push/PR to main\n- ESLint flat config with typescript-eslint, react-hooks, @next/eslint-plugin-next\n- Build passes clean, lint clean (no warnings)\n- Security hardening merged (PR #32, #36)\n- **Production deployed** via PM2 on port 3000 — http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- Health endpoint: `/api/health` (DB check, uptime, stats)\n- Custom 404 page (branded, with CTA)\n- OG + Twitter Card meta tags on listing pages (book cover, title, description)\n- Loading skeletons on all routes (root, listing detail, profile, notifications)\n- Error boundaries on all routes with retry functionality\n- Focus-visible styles for keyboard accessibility\n- **Accessibility improvements** (PR #49, merged + deployed):\n  - ARIA labels, roles, expanded states on all interactive elements\n  - Keyboard navigation on BookSearch dropdown (combobox pattern)\n  - autocomplete attributes on auth forms\n  - role=\"alert\" on error messages\n  - Skip-to-content link\n  - role=\"tablist\"/tab/tabpanel on profile tabs\n  - role=\"radiogroup\"/radio on format/platform buttons\n  - role=\"checkbox\" with keyboard support on approval toggle\n\n## Production\n- **URL**: http://89.167.127.85:3000\n- **Process manager**: PM2 (via npx)\n- **Config**: `app/ecosystem.config.js`\n- **Deploy script**: `scripts/deploy.sh`\n- **Logs**: `.claude-beat/logs/pm2-{out,error}.log`\n- **No reverse proxy** (nginx requires root — not available)\n- **No HTTPS** (no domain configured, no certbot)\n- PM2 process saved: `npx pm2 save` (restores on `pm2 resurrect`)\n\n## Open PRs\n- None\n\n## Closed Recently\n- #70: Auto-hide listings with past start dates — merged + deployed\n- #69: Listing edit and delete for authors — merged + deployed\n- #68: fix: generateMetadata crash, platform-aware notifications — merged + deployed\n\n## Open Issues\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — multiple follow-up reminders sent, still waiting\n- #54: **PAT expires ~March 27** (needs-human) — GH_TOKEN renewal required, ~4 days left\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser WORKS if: export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-$(id -u) && mkdir -p \"$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR\"\n- agent-browser crashes after extended use (memory pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n\n## Test Suite\n- 59 tests across 8 test files, all passing\n- Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings, notifications, profile, ratings, rate-limit\n- Not yet tested: telegram, discord, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, listing detail routes\n- Coverage: ~88% statement coverage on tested files\n- @vitest/coverage-v8 installed for coverage reporting\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~4 days remaining, still needs-human\n2. Check issue #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. No remaining approved issues — consider proposing new improvements\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":75,"oldLines":7,"newStart":75,"newLines":7,"lines":[" - PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)"," "," ## Test Suite","-- 59 tests across 8 test files, all passing","+- 60 tests across 8 test files, all passing"," - Tested: auth (login, register), health, listings, notifications, profile, ratings, rate-limit"," - Not yet tested: telegram, discord, profile/genres, profile/reading, profile/reputation, listing detail routes"," - Coverage: ~88% statement coverage on tested files"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01PiurtRpzNfkAj5XL3VbGiP","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Session complete. Here's a summary of what was accomplished:\n\n---\n\n## Session Summary — 2026-03-23 14:00 UTC\n\n### Production Health\n- **Status**: Healthy — homepage, API, and database all working correctly\n\n### Work Completed\n1. **Implemented #66: Auto-hide listings with past start dates** (P2)\n   - Browse API now filters out listings with past start dates by default\n   - Added `?include_past=true` query parameter to override the filter\n   - Added \"Past start date\" gray badge on listing detail pages\n   - PR #70 — created, CI passed, merged, deployed to production\n\n### Housekeeping\n- Closed issue #65 (listing edit/delete — was already merged in PR #69)\n- Added urgent reminder on #54 (PAT expires in 4 days)\n- Updated memory and session log\n\n### Open Items\n- **#54**: PAT expires March 27 (~4 days) — needs human action\n- **#21**: Telegram bot token — still waiting on human\n- No remaining approved issues in the backlog"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":313,"cache_read_input_tokens":53439,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":313},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"6f88fa39-6af5-4e21-af20-53fcaa16208c","uuid":"dfb4d753-015b-43ea-a11a-8361bc79a5be"}
